title: Universal Antique Grandfather Clock Winding Brass Key 5 Way (Even)
description:
The 5 way clock key can be used to wind grandfather clocks and other antique clocks so your antique clock can be both beautiful and functional. The key can also serve as a replacement or back up of original clock keys that are often lost with older antique grandfather clocks. The key is made of durable brass material and will last a lifetime. When you are uncertain about what key size you need, this winding key will ensure you have the right size.
